description: This rugged pair from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and heavy duty durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish on rough terrain. You can team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look. Upper Suede uppers with nubuck overlays on the toe counter and around the collar for better comfort and durability Stitch detailing as a design element and for greater reinforcement Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Logo tab on the side Appliquéd logo on the tongue Midsole Shock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfort Cushioned foot-bed for all day comfort Outsole TPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistance Multi-directional grooves for better grip Flex-grooves for better flexibility of the feet shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
